title: bug: pure sorcery cult Arkat unavailable in manual cult selection
description: Manual matrix requires a pure sorcery character, but no visible culture exposes Arkat despite Arkat source area data including Holy Country. Add attested UI access and regression coverage.
acceptance_criteria: A God Forgot character can select Arkat manually, and Arkat remains classified as pure sorcery.
close_reason: Fixed with regression coverage and manual browser/PDF QA evidence.

title: task: add page citations for changed reference data
description: Project standards review found changed culture-cult-map, miracle, and cult raw reference data lacks explicit page citations required by ADR-003.
acceptance_criteria: Changed reference entries include explicit PDF/page citations or page citation metadata sufficient for data attestability.
close_reason: Added page citations to changed reference data and coverage

title: test: cover valid import and direct setStep 13
description: Testing review found gaps in valid App.importCharacterData success behavior and direct App.agent.setStep(13) transition coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Tests assert valid imports apply state/recalculate/save/render/toast and setStep(13) calls prepare/render/save and returns final state.
close_reason: Added valid import and direct setStep(13) tests

title: bug: agent next must honor effective miracle cap
description: Correctness review found App.agent.next blocks Step 9 when devotionalPool exceeds available qualified miracles, while UI validation allows all available miracles. Reuse the shared effective cap.
acceptance_criteria: Agent Step 9 validation passes when all available qualified miracles are selected even if devotionalPool is larger.
close_reason: Agent Step 9 now uses shared effective miracle cap and regression coverage

title: bug: weapon aliases must not break exact weapon names
description: Correctness review found aliases such as Sickle Sword/Khopesh map exact data names to missing canonical targets. Ensure exact WEAPONS_DATA names resolve before aliases or aliases target existing weapons.
acceptance_criteria: Every weapon alias target resolves to a real weapon and exact WEAPONS_DATA names resolve successfully.
close_reason: Corrected alias targets and added alias integrity coverage

title: bug: sanitize imported companion render fields
description: Compound review found nested companion import fields can reach Review/Play innerHTML without deep validation or escaping. Coerce/escape nested values and add regression coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Malicious companion nested fields render escaped in Review and Play mode, and numeric fields are coerced before persistence/rendering.
close_reason: Deep-validated/coerced companion imports, escaped companion review/play rendering, and added XSS regressions

title: bug: escape imported Step 7 background fields
description: Compound review found imported gender/family/backgroundEvents render into Step 7 without attribute/textarea escaping. Add escaping and regression coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Malicious imported Step 7 fields render escaped and cannot break textarea/input markup.
close_reason: Fixed Step 7 escaping and added regression coverage

title: test: fully manual character generation matrix for all fixes
description:
Final mandatory manual acceptance bead. Use real clicks/typing/selects, not App.agent shortcuts. Covers all fixes and edge cases from this remediation epic.

## Required Skills
agent-browser,manual-qa
acceptance_criteria: Fully manual browser character generations pass for Theist, Animist, Sorcery, and Hybrid cult types, including changed-mind/deselect flows, Pimper's Block, malicious text display, save/load/reload, Play Mode magic output, and PDF export screenshots read with vision.
close_reason: Completed manual theist/animist/sorcery/hybrid matrix plus exploratory changed-mind QA, Play Mode, save/load/random, and PDF visual checks.

title: task: run compound engineering review gates after implementation
description:
Encode required compound-engineering review flow after TDD implementation.

## Required Skills
/ce-code-review,/ce-correctness-review,security,performance
acceptance_criteria: After implementation beads close, run ce-code-review, ce-correctness-review, security, reliability, testing, performance, and project-standards reviews; all high-signal findings are closed or tracked.
close_reason: Compound review gates ran; findings were bead-tracked, fixed, and regression-tested

title: bug: harden untrusted character rendering and schema validation
description:
GREEN bead for XSS hardening across user/import-controlled render paths and companion hit-location handlers.

## Required Skills
tdd,security,javascript
acceptance_criteria: Strict import schema rejects dangerous keys and invalid object shapes; user/imported text uses textContent/value or context escaping; dynamic inline handlers with imported data are removed or converted to data-* / listeners.
close_reason: Added shared escaping for untrusted wizard/review/companion render paths and replaced companion hit-location inline string indexing with a data-location handler.

title: test: add imported character XSS regression coverage
description:
RED bead for stored/DOM XSS and inline-handler injection findings from security agents.

## Required Skills
tdd,security,testing
acceptance_criteria: Failing tests load malicious character values in name, concept, passions, equipment, armor, companions, and companion hit-location keys and assert payloads render as text or are rejected without executing/breaking DOM.
close_reason: Added RED tests for wizard Step 1 text escaping, Step 13 review escaping, and companion hit-location handler injection.

title: bug: harden localStorage and import failure handling
description:
GREEN bead for robust persistence/import failure handling.

## Required Skills
tdd,javascript
acceptance_criteria: LocalStorage failures do not crash the UI; corrupt saved data is quarantined/cleared with visible recovery; imports validate into temp data and commit atomically; FileReader error/abort is handled.
close_reason: Wrapped localStorage read/write failures with surfaced errors, added atomic save-shape validation, and routed file imports through importCharacterData before mutating live CharacterData.

title: test: cover corrupt storage and malformed import recovery
description:
RED bead for reliability findings around localStorage/import trust boundaries and partial mutation of CharacterData.

## Required Skills
tdd,testing
acceptance_criteria: Failing tests cover corrupt syntactically-valid localStorage, disabled/quota localStorage, malformed import JSON, wrong field types, FileReader error/abort, and atomic import behavior.
close_reason: Added RED tests for throwing localStorage reads/writes, malformed snapshot atomic rejection, and file-import validation before mutation.

title: bug: canonicalize character serialization and imports
description:
GREEN bead for canonical CharacterData snapshot/apply flow. Fix save/load double-encoding, localStorage/file import schema drift, missing animist/sorcery fields, companions, and versioned envelope compatibility.

## Required Skills
tdd,javascript
acceptance_criteria: One canonical plain-object serializer/apply path is used by file save/load and localStorage; save no longer double-encodes JSON; magic selections/resources and companions survive reload/import.
close_reason: Canonicalized character snapshots through toPlainObject/toJSON/applyPlainObject, fixed save export payloads, preserved magic/companion state in JSON/localStorage, and accepted versioned envelopes.

title: test: add serialization and persistence round-trip coverage
description:
RED bead for serializer/import/export persistence bugs found by correctness, API-contract, simplicity, and pattern reviewers. Tests must use public app interfaces rather than source-string assertions.

## Required Skills
tdd,testing
acceptance_criteria: Failing behavior tests cover App.saveCharacter/App.loadCharacter payload round-trip, localStorage round-trip, versioned-envelope import, companions, boundSpirits, sorcerySpells, and magic resource fields.
close_reason: Added behavior-level RED tests for object save payloads, complete magic/companion JSON round-trip, localStorage round-trip, and versioned envelope import.

title: epic: remediate compound-engineering fleet findings with TDD
description:
Parent epic for remediating all compound-engineering fleet findings using the requested TDD-first workflow. Flow: create failing behavior tests, implement smallest fix, run unit/browser checks, run compound review agents, then complete full manual character-generation acceptance.

## Required Skills
tdd,/ce-work,/ce-code-review,/ce-correctness-review
acceptance_criteria: All child beads are closed; node test-chargen.js passes; browser/manual matrix bead is closed; compound review beads are closed; changes are merged and pushed to origin and paphos.
notes: Follow-up filed from user screenshot: Copyparty root still appears as a cluttered flat dump after initial upload; needs a proper player-library reorganization.
close_reason: All child beads are closed; unit/browser/manual QA gates passed; Copyparty fileserver and handouts were reorganized, verified, synced, and pushed to origin and paphos.

title: chore: update agent skills and plugins
description: Update Copilot/Claude global skills/plugins to latest available upstreams and sync repo-local project skills from the current global copies where applicable.
close_reason: Updated Copilot Compound Engineering plugin, Claude plugin marketplaces/caches, git-backed global skill/plugin repos, mattpocock TDD global skills, and project-local ignored RPI skill copies.

title: docs: require Copyparty sync after remote-file local edits
description: Update repo-level AGENTS.md so future agents always sync changes to the Loving Kypris Copyparty server after local edits that affect player-facing remote files, preserving the established remote layout.
close_reason: Updated AGENTS.md with mandatory Copyparty sync guidance and embedded the current live player-visible fileserver layout.

title: bug: Step 7 age defaults to invalid 0 and blocks Step 11
description: Full manual QA for mythras-chargen-5wat found Step 7 renders Age as 0 from default CharacterData.age, allows Next without correction, then Step 11 blocks with 'Invalid age'. A human skipping optional background details can get stuck late in chargen.
acceptance_criteria: New regression proves a fresh wizard renders a valid default age or applies one before Step 11; validateCurrentStep/getValidationState agree on invalid age handling; a full browser path can skip editing Step 7 and still reach Play Mode.
close_reason: Fixed Step 7 age default/invalid-edit regression with behavior tests, browser edge verification, and clean correctness re-review.

title: bug: sorcery incorrectly uses Rune Affinity instead of RAW Invocation/Shaping
description: Hannu clarified: 'Have not mapped the sorcery to runes. Using invocation shaping only.' Current app and handouts say sorcery uses spell Rune Affinity and Law Rune. Correct character generator mechanics and player handouts to RAW Invocation/Shaping until an attested rune map exists.
acceptance_criteria: Sorcery picker, Play Mode/PDF text, initiation gate, and handouts describe RAW Invocation/Shaping rather than spell Rune Affinity/Law Rune; tests cover the corrected behavior; public handouts are republished if changed.
close_reason: Fixed sorcery to RAW Invocation/Shaping; updated app, PDF/Play Mode text, handouts, tests, and published Copyparty.

title: bug: changing cultures can leave stale native language skill
description: Chaos QA found a Telmori build character entering Step 5 with stale Language (Heortling) in CharacterData.culturalSkills after culture changes. Native language must match the current culture or be absent if no source mapping exists.
acceptance_criteria: A public test proves switching cultures clears the previous native language and applies only the current culture's native language; Step 5 cultural skill budget ignores stale language keys; browser QA confirms Telmori no longer carries Language (Heortling) after switching from Sartarite/Praxian paths.
close_reason: Closed as not a defect: CULTURE_NATIVE_LANGUAGE intentionally maps Telmori Hsunchen to Language (Heortling), so the observed Step 5 skill matched current source data rather than stale state.

title: bug: changing cultures leaves Step 4 homeland blank but valid
description: Chaos QA found that switching cultures clears/changes homeland options but leaves CharacterData.homeland blank. Step 4 validation currently checks culture and combat style only, so users can advance with no homeland after changing cultures.
acceptance_criteria: A public test proves Step 4 blocks cultures with homeland options until a valid homeland is selected or auto-selects a valid homeland deterministically; changing cultures never leaves a blank or invalid homeland while Step 4 appears complete; browser QA confirms culture switching plus suggested builds advances only with a visible valid homeland.
close_reason: Fixed with TDD: changing cultures now resets homeland to a valid visible option; browser verified Praxian Pimper's Block -> Telmori resets to Telmori Wilds and completes.

title: bug: suggested builds create invalid 76-point characteristics
description: Step 4 Suggested Character Builds set all seven characteristics to 10 and two recommended stats to 13, producing 76 total points even though point-buy characters must total exactly 75. This can create mechanically invalid characters after Step 2.
acceptance_criteria: A public test proves every suggested build applies characteristics totaling exactly 75 while keeping the recommended high stats visibly high; applying/changing builds repeatedly does not leave invalid characteristic totals; browser QA verifies at least one changed-build path remains valid.
close_reason: Fixed with TDD: suggested builds now normalize characteristics to exactly 75 points while keeping recommended high stats; browser build matrix confirmed all 16 builds total 75.

title: bug: suggested builds do not apply valid combat styles
description: Chaos QA found Step 4 Suggested Character Builds claim they set combat style, but _doApplyBuild only changes characteristics and career. Several build style names also do not match actual culture combat styles, leaving users with unset or stale combat style state after changing builds/cultures.
acceptance_criteria: Public tests prove every suggested build references an existing combat style for its culture and applying a build sets that combat style, clears pending combat-style selection, and updates the Step 4 UI without stale state. Browser chaos checks confirm changing builds/cultures does not retain an old style.
close_reason: Fixed with TDD: every suggested build now references a real culture combat style and applying builds updates combatStyles without stale selection; browser matrix covered all 16 builds.

title: qa: verify revised handouts as a non-technical player
description: After the handout rewrite and source PDF publish work, perform a player-lens QA pass over the handouts and Copyparty layout. Validate the reading path, link targets, page references, and terminology as if preparing for game day without repository access.
acceptance_criteria: Browser-test the handout index and each path page from Copyparty; verify links to book PDFs and the canonical cult one-pager folder; confirm there are no internal repo/agent/data references; confirm the reading order is clear for first-session prep; file child bug beads for any confusing wording, missing page reference, broken link, or unsupported rules mention.
close_reason: QA passed: browsed published Copyparty handouts as a player, verified navigation, source PDF links, character generator link, root layout, no internal handout terms, and captured/read screenshots.

title: docs: document Copyparty layout in AGENTS.md
description: Update the project-level AGENTS.md with the canonical Loving Kypris Copyparty filesystem layout and maintenance protocol so future agents know where player-facing files belong and how to publish/edit them safely.
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md documents the visible /w layout (Start Here, character generator, characters/active-pregens, rules/handouts, sources/books), archive locations outside the player root, required SSH/podman copy workflow, verification commands, naming conventions, what must not be placed in root, and how to update active pregens/handouts/source PDFs without reintroducing clutter.
close_reason: Documented canonical Loving Kypris Copyparty /w layout, root hygiene, archive/staging locations, Podman publishing workflow, verification commands, and naming rules in AGENTS.md.

title: ops: publish Monster Island and A Bird in the Hand PDFs
description: Add the missing player-needed source PDFs to the Loving Kypris Copyparty source library: /home/worldofgeese/Downloads/A Bird In The Hand.pdf and /home/worldofgeese/Downloads/Mythras Monster Island/Monster Island/Monster Island.pdf. Use clear player-facing filenames and update handout references to point only at available PDFs/folders.
acceptance_criteria: Monster Island and A Bird in the Hand are copied into the canonical Copyparty sources/books area with readable names; no duplicate/cluttered root files are introduced; handouts reference these PDFs only through player-facing paths/names; container and browser/HTTP checks confirm both PDFs are visible and downloadable.
close_reason: Published Monster Island and A Bird in the Hand under /w/sources/books, updated handout links/page references, and verified public HTTP/browser access.

title: docs: rewrite handouts for player-facing learning path
description:
Revise docs/handouts so non-technical players can use them as a guided reading path for Glorantha-in-Mythras preparation. Remove internal implementation references (ADRs, AGENTS.md, JSON, attestable/data-chain rules, chargen jargon, Hannu attribution) and replace them with clear player-facing language, book PDF page references, and fully explained house rules.

## Required Skills
compound-engineering:ce-plan,compound-engineering:ce-docs-review,tdd,compound-engineering:ce-code-review
acceptance_criteria: Handouts no longer mention ADRs, AGENTS.md, JSON/reference data, attestable chains, data rules, or Hannu; 'chargen' is replaced/explained as the character generator; mysticism is removed until supported; rune affinities and spirit rune affinities are explained with book page references; Shaping is explained with a Mythras page reference; house rules are fully explained because players have no separate source; references are only to player-available book PDFs and the canonical cult one-pager folder https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1CKNxkpoL4sWfzdbkglQyiYvCBXlmyFIj; old handout git history is reviewed and the gradual learning-path structure is restored/improved; all links/page references are verified.
close_reason: Rewrote player handouts as a progressive learning path, removed internal jargon, explained house rules and magic terms, added book PDF/source links, reviewed with compound agents, tested and published.

title: qa: regenerate Ionara and Vasana pregens through chargen
description: Ionara and Vasana are active player pregens and should no longer be served as old RuneQuest 7-derived example-sheet ports. Validate the Ionara and Vasana JSON fixtures against the current chargen mechanics, fix any fixture/app issues using TDD if they are not mechanically valid, generate fresh PDFs through the chargen export path, preserve their bios in the exported sheets, publish those PDFs in the Copyparty characters area, pull/archive the old example-sheets locally, and remove old example-sheets from the player-visible server so they do not confuse players.
acceptance_criteria: Ionara and Vasana fixtures load cleanly in the current chargen; both builds are mechanically valid under current Step 4-13 validation and Play Mode totals; bios survive into the generated PDF exports; fresh chargen-generated Ionara and Vasana PDFs are visible in the server characters directory; old RuneQuest-derived example-sheet PDFs are backed up locally outside the player-visible root and removed from Copyparty player visibility; any mechanical mismatch is fixed with a failing test first and then green tests; final layout is browser/container verified.
notes: Plan: inspect Ionara/Vasana fixtures and existing fixture tests; add a public-interface regression if fixture mechanical validity is not already covered; load both through chargen/agent-browser, verify Play Mode and PDF export retain bios; archive old visible example sheets locally; publish only fresh chargen-generated pregens in /w/characters.
close_reason: Ionara/Vasana fixtures validated with TDD, PDFs regenerated through chargen export, bios preserved, old example-sheets archived/removed from visible Copyparty, active pregens published and browser/container verified.

title: ops: properly reorganize Loving Kypris Copyparty root
description: The first Loving Kypris publish only copied current files into /w and left Copyparty's root cluttered with mixed PDFs, duplicate chargen entrypoints, legacy quickstart HTML, docs/, pdf/, and start-here.html. Reorganize the player-facing fileserver so players land on a clean, obvious Glorantha-in-Mythras library rather than a flat file dump.
acceptance_criteria: Copyparty root no longer looks like a mixed staging dump; root contains a small, intentional set of player-facing entrypoints/folders with clear names; the current chargen has one canonical visible entrypoint; handouts are grouped under a clear handouts/rules path; required source PDFs are grouped under a clear sources/books path with human-readable names; legacy or duplicate files are archived or removed from the player root; Start Here is easy to find from the root; existing useful character-sheet PDFs remain available in an intentional folder; verify the final layout with Copyparty directory listing and HTTP/container checks.
notes: User clarified old example-sheets are RuneQuest-derived and confusing. Keep this reorg bead open until old example-sheets are pulled/hidden and new chargen-generated Ionara/Vasana pregens replace them in the visible characters area.
close_reason: Copyparty root reorganized into Start Here, chargen, characters, rules, and sources; old root clutter and RQ-derived example sheets archived out of player visibility; active pregens and handouts/source PDFs verified.

title: qa: chaos-test Suggested Character Builds across Step 4 cultures
description: Run a full browser QA pass over every Step 4 culture that offers Suggested Character Builds. Exercise the UI as a chaos user: choose a culture, click one suggested build, click another suggested build, change homeland/combat-style choices, change cultures, return to prior cultures, and verify stale selections do not leak between cultures or builds. For each suggested build path, continue through chargen to confirm it can produce a fully valid character, including Step 5 cultural allocations/runes/folk magic, Step 8 career/professional skill choices, Step 9 cult/magic requirements, Play Mode, and PDF export where applicable.
acceptance_criteria: All Step 4 cultures with Suggested Character Builds are covered; changing between suggested builds and cultures leaves no stale or invalid state; every suggested build can be completed into a valid character or has a follow-up bug bead with reproduction steps; Play Mode and PDF output are spot-checked for representative build/culture combinations; any discovered bug/UX issue is filed as a child bead before this QA bead closes.
close_reason: All six cultures with Suggested Character Builds were chaos-clicked across 16 build cards; culture/build switching, valid homeland reset, combat style application, 75-point stat budgets, representative completion, Play Mode, and PDF export were verified. Child bugs were filed and fixed.

title: task: handout review blockers
description: Adversarial document review found player handouts can skip Folk Magic, imply scene-by-scene miracle preparation, soften associated-cult one-use recovery, depend on GM/source PDFs, and lack player-facing page reference trail. Fix wording/navigation/source trail.
close_reason: Updated handout start path, Folk Magic guidance, miracle recovery wording, prep checklist, and Source Trail page-reference table

title: bug: quick boost creates hidden invalid allocations
description: Correctness/maintainability reviews found Step 9 Quick Boost mutates earlier cultural/career pools into hidden or illegal skills. Constrain or refactor so Quick Boost cannot create invalid Step 5/10 allocations and add regression coverage.
close_reason: Quick Boost no longer mutates cultural/career pools; covered by hidden allocation and cap regressions

title: bug: review blockers in cult initiation edge cases
description: Adversarial review found weapon-specific combat requirements fall back to non-matching styles, placeholder cult skills lower initiation counts, changing cult preserves stale spirits/spells, and apostrophes in specializations break allocation handlers. Fix and cover with tests.
close_reason: Fixed weapon-specific combat style matching, placeholder cult-skill counting, stale cult magic clearing, and apostrophe-safe Step 10 handlers; covered by regressions and manual browser/PDF QA

title: bug: review blockers in Step 9 validation and agent parity
description: Compound review found Step 9 human validation diverges from getValidationState/App.agent paths and App.agent.selectMiracle rejects valid miracle objects. Fix with shared validation/selection primitives and regression coverage.
close_reason: Fixed shared Step 9 validation across human and agent paths; App.agent.selectMiracle now uses qualified miracle names; covered by 305 unit tests and 33 browser/API assertions

title: bug: Waha tribal combat style requirement does not match selected tribal style
description: Hybrid Waha manual QA found Combat Style (Tribal) resolves to a nonexistent skill instead of selected Praxian tribal style such as Bison. Cult initiation should use the selected culture combat style total.
close_reason: Fixed and verified in Waha hybrid manual QA plus regression tests

title: bug: duplicate cultural skill row when a choice resolves to an existing skill
description: Waha/Praxian manual QA found selecting Navigate for the Navigate-or-Swim cultural choice renders two Navigate inputs bound to the same skill. Collapse duplicate resolved rows so state and visible budget stay coherent.
close_reason: Fixed and verified in Waha Praxian manual QA plus regression tests

title: bug: Customs allocations split into duplicate skill rows
description: Manual Arkat Play Mode QA showed both Customs (God Forgot) and plain Customs rows. Career/bonus allocations to Customs should merge into the culture-specific Customs standard skill.
close_reason: Fixed with TDD regressions and manual browser/PDF verification

title: bug: zero-point placeholder cultural skills block Step 5
description: Manual Arkat QA found Step 5 blocks on Craft (any) even with 0 allocated points. Validation should require specialization only for unresolved placeholder skills that have allocated points.
close_reason: Fixed with TDD regressions and manual browser/PDF verification

title: bug: Arkat sorcery initiation uses Invocation skill instead of rune affinities
description: Manual Arkat QA found Step 9 blocked because Invocation/Shaping were resolved as ordinary skills. Verify sorcery uses spell Rune Affinity and Law Rune per handouts before closing.
close_reason: Fixed with TDD regressions and manual browser/PDF verification

title: bug: enforce combat style and social class before Play Mode
description: Manual Daka Fal QA found Play Mode could be reached with no Praxian combat style, leaving Sling at 0%, and with blank Social Class. Flow: TDD regression, fix validation, rerun manual Daka Fal Play/PDF.
close_reason: Fixed with TDD regressions and manual browser/PDF verification

title: bug: avoid duplicate companion labels in PDF export
description: Fix companion export labels like 'Shadowcat (Shadowcat (bonded))', audit other companions for duplicate type/status text, and add PDF/export regression coverage.
close_reason: Deduplicated companion labels in PDF/export output and verified Shadowcat bonded rendering

title: bug: investigate Sling skill showing 0 in Play Mode
description: Determine why Sling can show 0 skill in Play Mode, verify expected Mythras/Glorantha behavior, fix skill compilation or combat-style rendering if needed, and add regression coverage.
close_reason: Fixed combat-style validation and skill derivation so selected weapon styles such as Sling render with the proper skill total

title: bug: clean miracle OCR artifacts such as B Claws
description: Audit miracle names for OCR/glyph artifacts like 'B Claws', fix references/theism-miracles.json and inline MIRACLES_DATA through the data flow, and add tests that catch malformed miracle prefixes.
close_reason: Cleaned miracle OCR artifacts in reference/inline data and added malformed miracle prefix regression coverage

title: bug: resolve Primary/Secondary skill ordering UX
description: Investigate Step 8 careers that offer paired placeholder skills like Lore (Primary)/Lore (Secondary). Decide whether secondary choices should be gated/renamed when primary is not selected, identify other affected skills, fix UI/model behavior, and add regressions.
close_reason: Resolved Primary/Secondary placeholder UX with independent disambiguation cleanup, apostrophe-safe handlers, and regression coverage

title: qa: full manual character and handout acceptance pass
description: After fixes and docs publishing, run human-style browser QA through affected character flows, change choices and edge cases, verify Play Mode/PDF export, review handouts as player materials, and close any discovered follow-up beads.
close_reason: Completed full manual magic-path QA matrix, Play Mode/PDF export verification, handout wording review, and follow-up age regression fix.

title: ops: reorganize Loving Kypris copyparty player files
description: Inspect the Loving Kypris copyparty file layout, reorganize player-facing files, copy the latest index.html as the chargen tool, publish handouts and required PDFs/sources, and verify remote availability.
close_reason: Published latest chargen to /w/index.html and /w/aig-character-sheet.html, added /w/start-here.html, deployed docs/handouts under /w/docs/handouts, and verified Copyparty serves the files inside the container

title: docs: audit and rebuild player handouts
description: Audit docs/handouts and source references, reorganize them into a confident player-facing guided rules path for Glorantha-in-Mythras with page references, sources, magic-system guidance, and preparation checklist.
close_reason: Rebuilt docs/handouts into a player-facing guided rules path with preparation checklist, house rules, and source trail page references

title: fix Decapod governance validation entrypoints
description: Decapod validate flagged root agent entrypoint issues: AGENTS.md exceeded the line limit, CLAUDE/GEMINI/CODEX entrypoints were missing, legacy agent namespace references remained in docs, and required container/elevated-permission/session-password mandate language was absent. Remediate these so publish validation can run cleanly.
close_reason: Compressed AGENTS.md below Decapod line limit, added root CLAUDE/GEMINI/CODEX entrypoints, added required mandate language, and removed legacy namespace reference.

title: bug: inline miracle data drifted from references
description: Final project-standards review found MIRACLES_DATA in index.html no longer matches references/theism-miracles.json: She Who Waits has combined Mindblast Awaken inline, and Queen Deezola/Teelo Norri Summon Lune runes differ from the reference JSON. Update inline data from references and verify.
close_reason: Fixed from final compound review: test runner exits nonzero on failure; miracle reference and inline data are synced and clean.

title: bug: test runner exits zero on failures
description: Final compound testing review found test-chargen.js increments failedTests but exits 0 even when failures occur, which can make CI/automation report success for broken regressions. Exit non-zero when failedTests > 0 and cover/verify the behavior.
close_reason: Fixed from final compound review: test runner exits nonzero on failure; miracle reference and inline data are synced and clean.

title: bug: PDF export clips long bound spirit text
description: Manual PDF visual QA found long bound-spirit descriptions in the single-page PDF run past the right edge and are clipped. Wrap spirit lines within the page content width and add a regression so generated PDF text stays within bounds.
close_reason: Fixed with regression coverage and manual browser/PDF QA evidence.

title: bug: Random in Play Mode leaves stale visible sheet
description: Exploratory browser QA found clicking the Random button while in Play Mode updates CharacterData, but the visible Play Mode sheet continues to show the previous character. Refresh the active mode after random generation so the UI and model stay in sync.
close_reason: Fixed with regression coverage and manual browser/PDF QA evidence.

title: bug: invalid character import accepts arbitrary object
description: Exploratory browser QA found App.importCharacterData({bad:true}) returns true and clears the loaded character instead of rejecting the file. Fix validation so load/import rejects arbitrary or incomplete objects and preserves current state.
close_reason: Fixed with regression coverage and manual browser/PDF QA evidence.

title: bug: Step 11 permits multiple hobby professional skills
description: Manual chaos QA found Step 11 lets a character add Art (Painting) as the one hobby professional skill, then add Lockpicking as another new professional skill with no warning. Enforce the one hobby professional/combat-style addition consistently for all skills not already learned through culture or career, and cover with tests.
close_reason: Fixed with regression coverage and manual browser/PDF QA evidence.

title: bug: rejected folk magic cap leaves checkbox visually checked
description: Manual chaos QA found that attempting a third Step 10 folk magic spell shows the cap toast but the checkbox remains visually checked even though CharacterData rejects it. Fix checkbox rollback for rejected folk magic/spell selections and cover with tests.
close_reason: Fixed with regression coverage and manual browser/PDF QA evidence.

title: bug: invalid skill inputs remain visually out of sync after clamp
description: Manual chaos QA found that entering 999 or -5 in Step 10 skill point fields clamps CharacterData but leaves the visible input at the invalid value, creating misleading budget/field UX. Fix input synchronization for cultural/career/bonus point updates and cover with tests.
close_reason: Fixed with regression coverage and manual browser/PDF QA evidence.

title: manual QA: exploratory human-style edge cases
description: Click through the wizard like a human: invalid attempts, changed choices, back/forward navigation, weird but valid combinations, button interactions, screenshots, and bug capture/fixes before final publish.
notes: Exploratory QA found/fixed Step10 visual sync bugs; continuing Step11 hobby-rule bug investigation.
close_reason: Fixed with regression coverage and manual browser/PDF QA evidence.

title: test: remove false-confidence and source-string tests
description:
Replace brittle/false-confidence tests surfaced by testing and maintainability reviewers.

## Required Skills
tdd,testing
acceptance_criteria: Browser validation no longer records false passes without evidence; PDF tests exercise behavior via mock output capture; random placeholder generation tests are deterministic and assert unresolved placeholders are absent.
notes: Replaced the remaining generated-handler source-string assertion with a render-behavior test. PDF source-inspection tests remain for a later pass.

feat: Deterministic cult PDF ingestion pipeline — clean extraction without OCR garbage
fix: Correct ~400 garbled OCR entries across all cult MIRACLES_DATA, reference JSONs, and inline constants
notes:
## OCR Garbage Cleanup Plan

### Scope
~400 entries flagged with `split_from_garbled: true` and/or `rune_inferred: true` across
the MIRACLES_DATA inline constant in index.html. These are OCR artifacts from cult one-pager
PDF extractions.

### Examples Found
- "gow Fear 4 Summon Lune" → should be "Fear" + "Summon Lune" (fixed for Jakaleel)
- "o Summon Shade" → should be "Summon Shade"
- "Behold" → not a real miracle (OCR noise)
- Prefixes like "gow", "o", "R", "RS", "jo", "j", "i" are OCR-garbled rune abbreviations

### Approach
1. For each cult with garbled entries, compare inline data against:
   - The per-cult reference JSON (references/cults-raw/<pantheon>/<cult>.json)
   - The source PDF if available (references/cults-upstream/)
2. Extract correct miracle names from reference JSON cultMiracles field
3. Replace garbled inline entries with verified data
4. Remove split_from_garbled/rune_inferred flags from corrected entries
5. Vision-mode verify against source PDF pages where uncertain

### ADR-003 Compliance
All corrections must trace to the reference JSON. If the reference JSON itself
is garbled, fix it first against the source PDF with vision-mode verification.

### Scale
- Total garbled entries: ~400 (grep -c "split_from_garbled" index.html)
- Affected cults: most non-common cults (Storm, Lunar, Praxian, Darkness pantheons)
- Already fixed: 7 Mothers - Jakaleel (commit 4cd024e)

title: docs: Update AGENTS.md manual acceptance testing with correct visual verification flow

feat: Agent-browser-first API refactor — expose App.agent.getState(), granular actions, assertion helpers
notes:
## Agent-Browser-First Refactor Plan

### Goal
Make index.html natively automatable by agent-browser without DOM scraping or fragile eval expressions.

### Phase 1: State Query API
Add read-only API methods that return structured JSON:
- App.agent.getState() -> Full CharacterData + computed attributes
- App.agent.getUIState() -> {currentStep, visiblePickers, errors, toasts}
- App.agent.getValidation() -> {valid: bool, errors: [...], warnings: [...]}
- App.agent.getMagicState() -> {cultType, devotionalPool, boundSpiritSlots, sorceryResource, selectedMiracles, selectedSpells, selectedSpirits}

### Phase 2: Granular Action API
Add mutation methods that return success/error:
- App.agent.setStep(n) -> navigate to step
- App.agent.selectCult(name) -> select cult, trigger picker rendering
- App.agent.toggleSpell(name) -> toggle sorcery spell
- App.agent.toggleSpirit(name) -> toggle bound spirit
- App.agent.selectMiracle(name) -> select/deselect miracle
- App.agent.allocateSkill(name, points) -> allocate points to a skill
- App.agent.setCharacteristic(name, value) -> set a single characteristic

### Phase 3: Assertion Helpers
Add self-checking methods for automated testing:
- App.agent.assertSpellCount() -> {selected, limit, spells}
- App.agent.assertSpiritSlots() -> {used, limit, spirits}
- App.agent.assertMiracles() -> {selected, available, miracles}
- App.agent.assertPlayMode() -> {sections, errors, missing}
- App.agent.assertPDFExport() -> {success, errors}

### Phase 4: Event Log
- App.agent.getEventLog() -> [{action, timestamp, result, error}, ...]
- Auto-records all agent API calls with results

### Success Criteria
- All 30 existing E2E assertions still pass
- New API methods documented in .rpiv/guidance/agent-api.md
- agent-browser eval expressions become one-liners instead of multi-line IIFEs
- No DOM parsing needed for any test assertion

### Estimated Scope
- ~200 lines of new JS in index.html
- Update test-agent-api.mjs to use new API
- Update .rpiv/guidance/agent-api.md

U4: Document Hannu house rules as ADR-007 with Discord citations
description:
Create ADR-007 documenting all Hannu house rules with source citations using the pi-specdocs /adr skill. Rules to document from Discord (2026-03-29) screenshots and conversation:

1. Exhort replaced by Rune Affinities for casting
2. Casting Rune Spells table (5 situations)
3. Rune Spells Learning/Use/Recovery (cost, rank requirements, categories)
4. Devotional Pool Size: Initiate=POW/2, Acolyte=POW*0.75, Priest=POW
5. Theist Common Magic with Runes table
6. Animism: Binding → Spirit Rune affinity (Waha v6.0.1)
7. Sorcery: Invocation → Rune Affinity of spell, Shaping → Law Rune (AiG p.60)
8. Mysticism: Path of Immanent Mastery 'might' use it (Discord 2026-05-17)
9. Rank progression timing: proven 1yr, overseer 1yr, leader 2yr

Source screenshots: /home/worldofgeese/Downloads/2026-03-29_11-*.webp
Use the pi-specdocs /adr skill to create the ADR with proper template and four-point test.

description:
Use @joemccann/pi-pdf (installed) for programmatic PDF verification:
- pdf_extract_text: Extract text from generated character sheet PDFs
- Compare extracted PDF text against Play Mode DOM content
- pdf_info: Verify PDF metadata, page count, no corruption
- pdf_to_images: Convert generated PDFs to PNGs for visual comparison against Play Mode screenshots

This makes the fidelity check partially automatable rather than purely visual.

title: E2E U12: Validate all 14 existing fixtures load correctly in Play+PDF
description:
For each of 14 fixtures in fixtures/:
1. Load fixture JSON via chargen import mechanism
2. Switch to Play Mode - verify no errors, no undefined, no missing sections
3. Export PDF - use @joemccann/pi-pdf pdf_extract_text to verify PDF contains correct data
4. Use pdf_info to confirm PDF is valid (not corrupted, correct page count)
5. Verify cultType not-set triggers auto-detection gracefully (no crash)

pi-pdf tools enable automated text extraction from generated PDFs for comparison.
